# Capstone: End-to-End ML + OR Pipeline {#sec-capstone}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Build a complete ML + OR pipeline from raw data to deployed decision
- Integrate forecasting, stochastic optimization, and sensitivity analysis
- Evaluate solution quality vs. naive benchmarks
- Document and reproduce results in a production-ready notebook
:::

## Introduction

This chapter applies every technique in the book to a single real problem:
raw data → ML forecast → stochastic OR model → optimal decision → sensitivity analysis.

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
